title: atriplex lentiformis subsp. breweri
intro: Atriplex lentiformis subsp. breweri, also known as Brewer's saltbush, is a shrub-like plant that belongs to the Amaranthaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to help reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The plant's leaves and stems have been used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin irritations. The health benefits of Brewer's saltbush include its antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and support overall well-being.
